name: Update Changelog
description: Manually triggered to update CHANGELOG.md with changes since last commit

then.prompt: Please review all file changes since the last git commit, summarize the updates, and update CHANGELOG.md. Requirements: 1) Categorize by type (Features/Fixes/Docs/Refactor/etc.); 2) Be concise, one bullet point per item; 3) Write in ENGLISH; 4) Use today's date. Follow the Conventional Commits format and keep the bilingual structure (English primary, with Chinese/Japanese/Traditional Chinese translations).
